sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 11g. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 11g. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 24g. glycemic index is where this starts to get messy. for a dairy food, protein and practicality have to carry the case.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 24g. glycemic index is where this starts to get messy. for a dairy food, protein and practicality have to carry the case.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 3.5g. essential amino acids score is where things start to fall off. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 3.5g. essential amino acids score is where things start to fall off. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 6% DV, vitamin a at 8% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 6% DV, vitamin a at 8% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 13% DV, zinc at 3% DV, magnesium at 2% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 13% DV, zinc at 3% DV, magnesium at 2% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. high enjoyment factor because a real-world reason people eat it, even if the category fit is weak. still retains some calcium because not nutritionally empty, just weak compared with stronger dairy foods. still clearly dairy-based because that matters for fairness when picking anchors.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. sugar load is a major dairy-category problem because this pushes it away from what strong dairy foods are supposed to deliver. saturated fat is a major drawback because a second major strike against the food in this category. protein usefulness is weak for dairy because that makes it a poor fit compared with stronger dairy anchors like yogurt.

closing.summary: high enjoyment factor and still retains some calcium help ice Cream. but sugar load is a major dairy-category problem and saturated fat is a major drawback drag it down hard. best only when the taste or format matters more than getting the strongest dairy profile.
